name: github_set_org_copilot_space_collaborator_role
description: Set a collaborator role for an organization Copilot Space (PUT /orgs/{org}/copilot-spaces/{space_number}/collaborators/{actor_type}/{actor_identifier}). role may be reader, writer, admin, or no_access (204 when removed). See [Set a collaborator role for an organization Copilot Space](https://docs.gi
